name: YouTube Trailers
description:
Resolves YouTube trailers server-side with yt-dlp and stream-copy remuxes
them to AVPlayer-native fMP4 HLS, so tvOS / AVKit clients (Apple TV) play one
clean URL with zero on-device extraction — for both in-app trailers and the
Top Shelf. No re-encoding; resolution is cached and served as a live HLS
bundle. Includes a dashboard config page (tool paths, format selector, extra
yt-dlp arguments, cache location, yt-dlp version) and a daily prune scheduled
task that bounds the cache by age and LRU size cap so it never grows unbounded.
overview: Server-side YouTube trailers as AVPlayer-native HLS for tvOS clients.

versions.changelog: Server-side YouTube trailer resolution (yt-dlp) stream-copy remuxed to AVPlayer-native fMP4 HLS, for in-app trailers and the Top Shelf — zero on-device extraction. Dashboard config page (tool paths, format selector, extra yt-dlp arguments, cache directory, yt-dlp version) and a daily prune task that bounds the cache by age and LRU size.
